description: When David explicitly corrected the routing error (err-20260321-001), Jarvis acknowledged verbally but did not automatically log the correction to error-log.json. The executive had to ask 'verify that got recorded' before logging occurred.
correction: Any explicit correction from the executive must be logged to error-log.json immediately and transparently — no prompting required. Acknowledge the correction AND write the log entry in the same response.
systemic_fix: Whenever the executive corrects Jarvis or any agent behavior, the very next response must include a write to error-log.json. This is non-negotiable and should not require a second prompt.
